title: Quantized Space-Time
significance: First model of noncommutative spacetime; anticipated NCG by decades.

title: An Algebraic Approach to Quantum Field Theory
significance: Founds algebraic QFT: physics encoded in a net of local von Neumann algebras rather than fields.

title: Quantum Theory of Gravity. I. The Canonical Theory
significance: Derived the Wheeler-DeWitt equation; foundation of canonical quantum cosmology and the problem of time.

title: Standard forms of von Neumann algebras (Quasi-standard von Neumann algebras)
significance: Original (unpublished/circulated) construction of the modular operator and conjugation, foundation of modular theory.

title: Twistor Algebra
significance: Founding paper of twistor theory; introduces twistors as the fundamental geometry of conformal Minkowski space.

title: Vacuum quantum fluctuations in curved space and the theory of gravitation
significance: Founding paper of induced gravity: gravity as metric elasticity of the vacuum.

title: Construction of a crossing-symmetric, Regge-behaved amplitude for linearly rising trajectories
significance: Birth of string theory: the Euler beta-function dual-resonance amplitude that strings were later seen to produce.

title: Quantized Fields and Particle Creation in Expanding Universes I
significance: Founding field-theoretic treatment of gravitational particle production in cosmology.

title: Tomita's Theory of Modular Hilbert Algebras and its Applications
significance: Rigorous formulation and dissemination of Tomita's modular theory, including the link to KMS states.

title: Minisuperspace
significance: Introduced the minisuperspace truncation that made quantum cosmology calculationally tractable.

title: Black Holes and Entropy
significance: Introduces black-hole entropy proportional to horizon area and the generalized second law.

authors: J. M. Bardeen, B. Carter, S. W. Hawking
title: The Four Laws of Black Hole Mechanics
significance: Formulates the four laws of black-hole mechanics as analogues of thermodynamics.

title: Une classification des facteurs de type III
significance: Classification of type III factors into III_lambda via the modular spectrum; cornerstone of noncommutative geometry.

title: One-loop divergencies in the theory of gravitation
significance: Established one-loop on-shell renormalizability of pure gravity, framing the renormalizability question.

title: One-loop divergencies in the theory of gravitation
significance: Showed pure gravity is one-loop on-shell finite but diverges once matter is added; opened the question of perturbative renormalizability.

title: Particle Creation by Black Holes
significance: Derived Hawking radiation T_H=kappa/2pi; birth of black-hole thermodynamics and the information paradox.

title: Breakdown of Predictability in Gravitational Collapse
significance: Original statement of the information paradox: pure state evolves to mixed thermal state.

title: Nonlinear gravitons and curved twistor theory
significance: The nonlinear graviton: ASD Einstein metrics encoded as deformations of twistor complex structure; integrability of self-dual gravity.

title: Notes on black-hole evaporation
significance: Introduced the Unruh effect, Unruh temperature and the detector interpretation of particles.

authors: J. J. Bisognano, E. H. Wichmann
title: On the Duality Condition for Quantum Fields
significance: Identifies the modular flow of a wedge algebra with the Lorentz boost; modular Hamiltonian = boost, vacuum = Unruh-thermal.

title: Particle Emission Rates from a Black Hole
significance: Computes greybody factors and the precise evaporation rate, fixing the M^3 lifetime.

authors: D. Z. Freedman, P. van Nieuwenhuizen, S. Ferrara
title: Progress toward a theory of supergravity
significance: Construction of the first N=1 supergravity in 4D; founding paper of the supergravity program (Breakthrough Prize 2019).

title: Relative Entropy of States of von Neumann Algebras
significance: Defines relative entropy via the relative modular operator without density matrices; finite and monotonic even for type III algebras.

title: Vacuum expectation value of the stress tensor in an arbitrary curved background: The covariant point-separation method
significance: Established covariant point-splitting renormalization of the stress tensor in curved spacetime.

title: On self-dual gauge fields
significance: Ward correspondence: self-dual Yang-Mills <-> holomorphic bundles over twistor space; twistor source of YM integrability.

title: Renormalization of higher-derivative quantum gravity
significance: Proved that curvature-squared gravity is renormalizable in 4D, at the cost of a massive spin-2 ghost; the canonical reference for higher-derivative gravity.

title: The class of continuous timelike curves determines the topology of spacetime
significance: Theorem that causal structure fixes the conformal geometry; mathematical foundation of 'Order = conformal geometry'.

title: The necessity of quantizing the gravitational field
significance: Classic thought experiment arguing gravity must be quantized (widely contested).

authors: E. Cremmer, B. Julia, J. Scherk
title: Supergravity theory in eleven dimensions
significance: Unique maximal 11D supergravity, the low-energy limit of M-theory and the parent of 4D N=8 supergravity.

title: Ultraviolet divergences in quantum theories of gravitation
significance: Original formulation of the asymptotic-safety conjecture and the 2+epsilon expansion evidence.

title: Experimental Black-Hole Evaporation?
significance: Introduced the dumb hole and the acoustic analogue of Hawking radiation, founding analogue gravity.

title: Quantum geometry of bosonic strings
significance: Path-integral quantization of the string; critical dimension from the Weyl anomaly.

title: Universal upper bound on the entropy-to-energy ratio for bounded systems
significance: Introduced the Bekenstein bound, the entropy bound at the root of the holographic principle.

title: Creation of Universes from Nothing
significance: Original tunneling proposal: universe nucleates from nothing into de Sitter, no initial singularity or boundary condition.

authors: N. D. Birrell, P. C. W. Davies
title: Quantum Fields in Curved Space
significance: Canonical introductory textbook on QFT in curved spacetime.

authors: D. N. Page, W. K. Wootters
title: Evolution without evolution: Dynamics described by stationary observables
significance: Founding paper of relational/conditional time; time as correlation.

authors: J. B. Hartle, S. W. Hawking
title: Wave function of the Universe
significance: The no-boundary proposal; most influential paper of quantum cosmology, defines Psi via a Euclidean path integral over compact geometries.

authors: M. B. Green, J. H. Schwarz
title: Anomaly cancellations in supersymmetric D=10 gauge theory and superstring theory
significance: Trigger of the first superstring revolution; isolates SO(32) and E8xE8 as anomaly-free.

authors: D. J. Gross, J. A. Harvey, E. Martinec, R. Rohm
title: Heterotic String
significance: Construction of the heterotic string; leading phenomenological candidate (E8xE8 contains the Standard Model).

title: On the modular structure of local algebras of observables
significance: Shows that in an asymptotically scale-invariant QFT the local algebras are type III_1, fixing the type of subregion algebras.

authors: J. J. Halliwell, S. W. Hawking
title: Origin of structure in the Universe
significance: Treated perturbations about minisuperspace and the emergence of structure from the no-boundary state.

authors: S. J. Parke, T. R. Taylor
title: Amplitude for n-gluon scattering
significance: The Parke-Taylor MHV formula; first hint of the hidden simplicity (holomorphy) of gauge amplitudes.

title: Central charges in the canonical realization of asymptotic symmetries
significance: Computed c = 3L/2G for AdS3, foreshadowing AdS/CFT by a decade.

title: New Variables for Classical and Quantum Gravity
significance: Introduced Ashtekar variables, founding canonical LQG by recasting GR as a gauge theory with polynomial constraints.

title: The ultraviolet behavior of Einstein gravity
significance: Computed the nonzero two-loop R^3 divergence (coefficient 209/2880), proving the perturbative non-renormalizability of pure gravity.

authors: L. Bombelli, J. Lee, D. Meyer, R. D. Sorkin
title: Space-time as a causal set
significance: Founding paper of causal set theory: axioms, sprinkling, and the proposal that order plus number recovers Lorentzian geometry.

title: A current algebra for some gauge theory amplitudes
significance: MHV amplitudes as correlators on supertwistor space; precursor of twistor string theory.

title: The Dimension of Causal Sets
significance: PhD thesis introducing the Myrheim-Meyer dimension estimator from the ordering fraction.

title: Models for universal reduction of macroscopic quantum fluctuations
significance: Independent stochastic-collapse model with gravitational rate and diffusion.

title: The cosmological constant problem
significance: Defines the problem and proves the no-go theorem against adjustment mechanisms.

title: Exactly Solvable Field Theories of Closed Strings
significance: Double-scaling limit of matrix models giving a non-perturbative definition of 2D quantum gravity; conceptual template generalized by tensor models.

title: Loop space representation of quantum general relativity
significance: Established the loop representation, the birth of non-perturbative quantum gravity.

authors: B. S. Kay and R. M. Wald
title: Theorems on the uniqueness and thermal properties of stationary, nonsingular, quasifree states on spacetimes with a bifurcate Killing horizon
significance: Rigorous Hadamard states; uniqueness and Hawking-thermality of states on bifurcate-horizon spacetimes; nonexistence on Kerr and Schwarzschild-de Sitter.

title: Time and interpretations of quantum gravity
significance: Influential critique of Page-Wootters and survey of the problem of time.

title: A Model of Three-Dimensional Lattice Gravity
significance: First group field theory; SU(2)^3 field theory reproducing the Ponzano-Regge model of 3D gravity as Feynman diagrams.

title: Canonical Quantum Gravity and the Problem of Time
significance: Classic comprehensive review of the problem of time in canonical quantum gravity and cosmology.

title: Topological Lattice Models in Four Dimensions
significance: 4D extension of Boulatov: GFT over SU(2)^4 generating 4D BF theory, backbone of 4D geometric GFT models.

authors: A. E. M. van de Ven
title: Two-loop quantum gravity
significance: Independent confirmation of the Goroff-Sagnotti two-loop divergence.

title: Average Entropy of a Subsystem
significance: Random-subsystem entropy statistics underlying the Page curve.

title: Black Hole Entropy is Noether Charge
significance: Defines Wald entropy as the Noether charge of diffeomorphism invariance for arbitrary higher-curvature gravity.

title: Dimensional Reduction in Quantum Gravity
significance: First formulation of the holographic principle: quantum gravity has a lower-dimensional boundary description.

title: Entropy and area
significance: Entanglement entropy of a QFT obeys an area law - the bridge from entanglement to Bekenstein-Hawking entropy.

title: Exact evolution equation for the effective potential
significance: Introduced the exact functional RG (Wetterich) equation that underlies all FRG quantum-gravity work.

title: Half-sided modular inclusions of von-Neumann-algebras
significance: Introduces half-sided modular inclusions; with Borchers' theorem reconstructs translations with positive generator from modular data.

title: Information in Black Hole Radiation
significance: Defines the Page curve and Page time for unitary evaporation.

title: Pre-big-bang in string cosmology
significance: Founding paper of the pre-big-bang scenario based on scale-factor duality of string theory.

authors: L. Susskind, L. Thorlacius, J. Uglum
title: The Stretched Horizon and Black Hole Complementarity
significance: Proposes black-hole complementarity and the stretched horizon.

title: General relativity as an effective field theory: the leading quantum corrections
significance: Founding paper of gravity-as-EFT; showed reliable low-energy quantum predictions exist independent of UV completion.

title: Noncommutative Geometry
significance: Founding monograph; axioms of the spectral triple.

title: Quantum Field Theory in Curved Spacetime and Black Hole Thermodynamics
significance: Foundational textbook establishing the axiomatic and algebraic framework of QFTCS.

title: The World as a Hologram
significance: String-theoretic interpretation of holography; coined the holographic terminology.

title: Von Neumann Algebra Automorphisms and Time-Thermodynamics Relation in General Covariant Quantum Theories
significance: Thermal time hypothesis: in a covariant theory physical time is the modular flow of the state; modular theory addresses the problem of time.

title: Dirichlet-branes and Ramond-Ramond charges
significance: Identifies D-branes as the RR-charged objects required by duality; key to non-perturbative string theory.

title: Discreteness of area and volume in quantum gravity
significance: Derived the discrete area and volume spectra, the signature prediction of quantized geometry.

authors: A. Kempf, G. Mangano, R. B. Mann
title: Hilbert space representation of the minimal length uncertainty relation
significance: Canonical formalism for GUP and minimal length.

title: Noncommutative geometry and reality
significance: Introduces real structure J and KO-dimension, central to the SM construction.

title: Predictions from Quantum Cosmology
significance: Discusses extracting predictions from the wave function of the universe and the measure problem.

title: Scaling algebras and renormalization group in algebraic quantum field theory
significance: Scaling-algebra proof that local algebras are type III_1 whenever the theory has a nontrivial scaling limit (Buchholz-Fredenhagen-Haag circle).

title: Spin networks and quantum gravity
significance: Identified spin networks as an orthonormal basis of the kinematical Hilbert space.

title: String theory dynamics in various dimensions
significance: Proposes M-theory; unifies the five superstring theories as limits of an 11D theory (second superstring revolution).

authors: S. Doplicher, K. Fredenhagen, J. E. Roberts
title: The quantum structure of spacetime at the Planck scale and quantum fields
significance: Derives spacetime noncommutativity from quantum mechanics plus classical gravity (black-hole localization bound).

title: Thermodynamics of Spacetime: The Einstein Equation of State
significance: Cornerstone result: derives the Einstein equation from delta Q = T dS on local Rindler horizons.

title: Trouble for Remnants
significance: Argument against stable remnants via infinite production and degeneracy.

authors: N. Ishibashi, H. Kawai, Y. Kitazawa, A. Tsuchiya
title: A large-N reduced model as superstring
significance: IKKT matrix model: covariant non-perturbative definition of Type IIB string; candidate for emergent spacetime.

title: General Relativity as Geometro-Hydrodynamics
significance: Articulates the kinetic-theory/hydrodynamic hierarchy in which GR and semiclassical gravity emerge.

title: Heterotic and Type I string dynamics from eleven dimensions
significance: Heterotic M-theory: E8 gauge fields on the boundaries of an 11D interval.

authors: T. Banks, W. Fischler, S. H. Shenker, L. Susskind
title: M theory as a matrix model: A conjecture
significance: BFSS matrix model: candidate non-perturbative (DLCQ) definition of M-theory from D0-brane quantum mechanics.

title: Micro-local approach to the Hadamard condition in quantum field theory on curved space-time
significance: Established equivalence of the Hadamard form and the microlocal spectrum condition, founding rigorous algebraic QFTCS.

title: Microscopic Origin of the Bekenstein-Hawking Entropy
significance: First microscopic derivation of black-hole entropy S = A/4G from D-brane BPS state counting.

title: On Gravity's Role in Quantum State Reduction
significance: Penrose's gravitational wavefunction-collapse proposal underlying the Diosi-Penrose decoherence time.

title: Relational Quantum Mechanics
significance: Relational QM and the partial-observable viewpoint underpinning relational time.

title: The Spectral Action Principle
significance: Foundational: physics depends only on the spectrum of D; yields gravity plus gauge theory.

title: Black hole entropy from near-horizon microstates
significance: Reproduced BTZ entropy from the Cardy formula, a microscopic holographic derivation.

title: Quantum theory of geometry I: Area operators
significance: Rigorous construction of the area operator and its spectrum.

title: The Large N Limit of Superconformal Field Theories and Supergravity
significance: AdS/CFT correspondence; the most-cited HEP paper and the sharpest realization of holography.

title: Anti De Sitter Space And Holography
significance: Witten half of the dictionary; identified Hawking-Page transition with confinement-deconfinement.

authors: S. S. Gubser, I. R. Klebanov, A. M. Polyakov
title: Gauge Theory Correlators from Non-Critical String Theory
significance: GKP half of the precise AdS/CFT dictionary relating correlators to bulk fields.

title: Non-perturbative Lorentzian Quantum Gravity, Causality and Topology Change
significance: Foundational paper introducing causality into the gravitational path integral; exactly solvable 2D CDT and baby-universe topology change.

title: Nonperturbative evolution equation for quantum gravity
significance: Founding paper: derived the gravitational FRG equation and discovered the Reuter fixed point in the Einstein-Hilbert truncation.

authors: G. Amelino-Camelia, J. Ellis, N. E. Mavromatos, D. V. Nanopoulos, S. Sarkar
title: Potential Sensitivity of Gamma-Ray Burster Observations to Wave Dispersion in Vacuo
significance: Founding proposal that cosmological distances amplify E/E_Pl effects into observability; birth of quantitative QG phenomenology.

authors: A. Ashtekar, J. Baez, A. Corichi, K. Krasnov
title: Quantum Geometry and Black Hole Entropy
significance: Derived black hole entropy from isolated-horizon microstate counting, introducing the role of gamma.

title: Quantum Spin Dynamics (QSD)
significance: First mathematically well-defined, anomaly-free Hamiltonian constraint operator.

title: String Theory, Vols. I & II
significance: Standard graduate textbook; canonical source for spectrum, T-duality, D-branes and effective actions.

authors: D. P. Rideout, R. D. Sorkin
title: A Classical Sequential Growth Dynamics for Causal Sets
significance: Defines classical sequential growth from discrete general covariance and Bell causality; transitive percolation; classical halfway house to quantum dynamics.

title: A Covariant Entropy Conjecture
significance: Covariant entropy bound (light sheets) generalizing holography to arbitrary spacetimes and cosmology.

authors: O. Aharony, S. S. Gubser, J. Maldacena, H. Ooguri, Y. Oz
title: Large N Field Theories, String Theory and Gravity
significance: Canonical comprehensive review (MAGOO) containing the full AdS/CFT dictionary.

title: Non-trivial ultraviolet fixed point in quantum gravity
significance: Independent confirmation of the non-Gaussian UV fixed point.

title: String Theory and Noncommutative Geometry
significance: Non-commutative gauge theory from D-branes in a B-field; the Seiberg-Witten map.

title: U-duality and M-theory
significance: Comprehensive review of U-duality, exceptional groups and the BPS spectrum of M-theory.

authors: R. De Pietri, L. Freidel, K. Krasnov, C. Rovelli
title: Barrett-Crane model from a Boulatov-Ooguri field theory over a homogeneous space
significance: Showed the 4D Barrett-Crane spin-foam model arises from a GFT, establishing GFT as the generating functional of spin foams.

title: On revolutionizing quantum field theory with Tomita's modular theory
significance: Review establishing the Borchers commutation theorem linking modular flow to translations, basis of half-sided modular inclusions and emergent geometry.

title: Absence of a Singularity in Loop Quantum Cosmology
significance: First demonstration that the LQC difference equation resolves the big bang singularity; birth of loop quantum cosmology.

title: Microlocal spectrum condition and Hadamard form for vector-valued quantum fields in curved spacetime
significance: Extended the Hadamard/microlocal equivalence to vector and Dirac fields in dimension >=3.

authors: J. Khoury, B. A. Ovrut, P. J. Steinhardt, N. Turok
title: The Ekpyrotic Universe: Colliding Branes and the Origin of the Hot Big Bang
significance: Introduced the ekpyrotic scenario as a string/brane alternative to inflation.

title: The Thermodynamics of Black Holes
significance: Living Reviews reference on black-hole thermodynamics.

title: The Trans-Planckian Problem of Inflationary Cosmology
significance: Formulated the trans-Planckian problem and showed sensitivity of the inflationary spectrum to modified dispersion relations.

title: The dS/CFT Correspondence
significance: Original de Sitter holography proposal with a non-unitary Euclidean boundary CFT.

title: Quantum cosmology and eternal inflation
significance: Connects the tunneling wave function with eternal inflation and the measure problem.

title: Sakharov's induced gravity: a modern perspective
significance: Authoritative modern review of induced gravity and its sign/cosmological-constant problems.

title: The Holographic Principle
significance: Covariant entropy (Bousso) bound; precise statement of the holographic principle.

title: Ultraviolet fixed point and generalized flow equation of quantum gravity
significance: Added the R^2 term and demonstrated weak gauge/regulator dependence of g* lambda*, theta', theta''.

title: Black Hole Entropy as Causal Links
significance: Kinematic derivation of Bekenstein-Hawking entropy from counting causal links crossing a horizon ('horizon molecules').

title: Causal Sets: Discrete Gravity (Valdivia lectures)
significance: Pedagogical introduction to CST and the quantum-measure / histories approach to its dynamics.

title: Comments on the Stress-Energy Tensor Operator in Curved Spacetime
significance: Rigorous definition of the stress-energy operator via the Hadamard parametrix and Wick products.

title: Eternal Black Holes in Anti-de-Sitter
significance: Eternal AdS black hole = thermofield double; prototype of ER=EPR and unitarity via Euclidean path integral.

title: Monopoles, Duality, and String Theory
significance: Source of the completeness hypothesis: all gauge charges must be populated.

title: Perturbative Gauge Theory As A String Theory In Twistor Space
significance: Twistor string theory: N=4 SYM = B-model on CP^{3|4}; ignited the modern amplitudes revolution.

authors: N. E. J. Bjerrum-Bohr, J. F. Donoghue, B. R. Holstein
title: Quantum gravitational corrections to the nonrelativistic scattering potential of two masses
significance: Established the universal 41/(10 pi) coefficient of the leading quantum correction to the Newtonian potential.

title: The Phoenix Project: Master Constraint Programme for Loop Quantum Gravity
significance: Proposed the master constraint to handle the non-closing Hamiltonian constraint algebra.

title: The Universe in a Helium Droplet
significance: Develops the Fermi-point scenario: emergence of relativistic fields, gauge fields and gravity from the quantum vacuum of superfluid 3He.

authors: R. Brunetti, K. Fredenhagen, R. Verch
title: The generally covariant locality principle - a new paradigm for local quantum physics
significance: Formulated locally covariant QFT as a functor, encoding general covariance for QFTCS.

authors: S. Kachru, R. Kallosh, A. Linde, S. P. Trivedi
title: de Sitter vacua in string theory
significance: KKLT construction of metastable de Sitter vacua; origin of the landscape debate.

title: Black hole entropy from Quantum Geometry
significance: Precise U(1) microstate counting fixing the value of the Immirzi parameter.

title: Black hole entropy in Loop Quantum Gravity
significance: Established the universal -1/2 ln(A) logarithmic correction to the entropy.

title: Conformal Supergravity in Twistor-String Theory
significance: Showed conformal supergravity does not decouple from YM in the twistor string at loop level; a key obstruction.

title: Entanglement entropy and quantum field theory
significance: Replica-trick derivation of S=(c/3)ln(l) in 2D CFT - the field-theory side of the sharpest RT test.

authors: M. Ahmed, S. Dodelson, P. B. Greene, R. D. Sorkin
title: Everpresent Lambda
significance: First dynamical model realizing Sorkin's fluctuating cosmological constant, comparing to cosmological data.

title: Fixed points of quantum gravity
significance: Introduced the optimized regulator and gave robust evidence for the fixed point.

authors: F. Cachazo, P. Svrcek, E. Witten
title: MHV vertices and tree amplitudes in gauge theory
significance: CSW rules: MHV amplitudes as effective vertices for building all tree amplitudes.

authors: F. Dowker, J. Henson, R. D. Sorkin
title: Quantum Gravity Phenomenology, Lorentz Invariance and Discreteness
significance: Introduces swerves: Lorentz-invariant momentum diffusion from causal-set discreteness, a phenomenological window.

authors: P. Kovtun, D. T. Son, A. O. Starinets
title: Viscosity in Strongly Interacting Quantum Field Theories from Black Hole Physics
significance: Derived the universal eta/s >= 1/4pi bound; key application of holography to quark-gluon plasma.

authors: R. Britto, F. Cachazo, B. Feng, E. Witten
title: Direct Proof of Tree-Level Recursion Relation in Yang-Mills Theory
significance: BCFW recursion: tree amplitudes from on-shell building blocks, revolutionizing amplitude computation.

title: Fractal spacetime structure in asymptotically safe gravity
significance: Functional RG prediction of a UV spectral dimension D_S -> 2, matching the CDT result and providing an independent cross-approach convergence.

title: Group Field Theory: An Overview
significance: Standard early review establishing GFT as a field-theoretic completion of spin foams.

authors: J. P. Conlon, F. Quevedo, K. Suruliz
title: Large-volume flux compactifications: Moduli spectrum and D3/D7 soft supersymmetry breaking
significance: Large Volume Scenario for moduli stabilization, an alternative to KKLT.

authors: M. Bojowald, H. A. Morales-Tecotl, H. Sahlmann
title: On Loop Quantum Gravity Phenomenology and the Issue of Lorentz Invariance
significance: Analysis of modified dispersion relations and Lorentz invariance in LQG phenomenology.

authors: J. Ambjorn, J. Jurkiewicz, R. Loll
title: Reconstructing the Universe
significance: First demonstration that a macroscopic 4D semiclassical universe emerges dynamically from 4D CDT.

authors: J. Ambjorn, J. Jurkiewicz, R. Loll
title: Spectral Dimension of the Universe
significance: Discovery of the running spectral dimension 4.02 -> 1.80; dynamical dimensional reduction and a self-renormalizing UV proposal.

title: The fuzzball proposal for black holes: an elementary review
significance: Fuzzball proposal: horizonless microstate geometries resolve the information paradox.

title: The string landscape and the swampland
significance: Introduces the swampland concept distinguishing consistent from inconsistent low-energy EFTs.

authors: E. Bianchi, L. Modesto, C. Rovelli, S. Speziale
title: Graviton propagator in loop quantum gravity
significance: First computation of the graviton two-point function from a spin foam, matching linearized gravity.

title: Holographic derivation of entanglement entropy from AdS/CFT
significance: Founding RT formula S=A/4G; geometrizes entanglement entropy. Breakthrough Prize 2015, Dirac Medal 2024.

authors: Z. Bern, L. J. Dixon, R. Roiban
title: Is N=8 supergravity ultraviolet finite?
significance: Posed the modern finiteness question; the no-triangle hypothesis shows N=8 and N=4 SYM share UV behavior at one loop.

authors: A. Hamilton, D. Kabat, G. Lifschytz, D. A. Lowe
title: Local bulk operators in AdS/CFT: A boundary view of horizons and locality
significance: HKLL bulk reconstruction via smearing functions, foundation of subregion duality and bulk locality.

authors: C. Eling, R. Guedens, T. Jacobson
title: Non-equilibrium Thermodynamics of Spacetime
significance: Shows f(R) gravity and horizon shear require internal entropy production (spacetime viscosity).

title: On the Geometry of the String Landscape and the Swampland
significance: Original Swampland Distance Conjecture: infinite-distance moduli-space limits produce an infinite tower of exponentially light states.

authors: A. Ashtekar, T. Pawlowski, P. Singh
title: Quantum Nature of the Big Bang
significance: Rigorous LQC big bounce at rho_c ~ 0.41 rho_Planck; scalar field as internal clock; deterministic evolution across the Planck regime.

authors: A. Ashtekar, T. Pawlowski, P. Singh
title: Quantum Nature of the Big Bang: An Analytical and Numerical Investigation
significance: Detailed numerical confirmation of the bounce and construction of the physical Hilbert space and Dirac observables.

title: The Asymptotic Safety Scenario in Quantum Gravity
significance: Standard Living Review summarizing evidence (2+epsilon, large-N, truncated FRG) for asymptotic safety.

title: The causal set approach to quantum gravity
significance: Widely cited earlier review introducing the program and its main ideas.

title: The group field theory approach to quantum gravity
significance: Conceptual review: GFT as 3rd quantization of gravity, dynamical topology, non-commutative flux representation.

authors: N. Arkani-Hamed, L. Motl, A. Nicolis, C. Vafa
title: The string landscape, black holes and gravity as the weakest force
significance: Original Weak Gravity Conjecture; first sharp quantitative swampland criterion.

authors: J. Lewandowski, A. Okolow, H. Sahlmann, T. Thiemann
title: Uniqueness of diffeomorphism invariant states on holonomy-flux algebras
significance: The LOST uniqueness theorem giving LQG kinematics its rigidity.

title: Why Eppley and Hannah's Experiment Isn't
significance: Shows the Eppley-Hannah device cannot be built even in principle.

authors: V. Hubeny, M. Rangamani, T. Takayanagi
title: A covariant holographic entanglement entropy proposal
significance: Covariant (time-dependent) HRT generalization of the RT formula via extremal surfaces.

title: Asymptotic Safety
significance: Widely cited pedagogical review chapter on the asymptotic-safety program.

title: Black Holes as Mirrors: Quantum Information in Random Subsystems
significance: Shows old black holes rapidly re-emit injected information after the scrambling time.

authors: M. B. Green, H. Ooguri, J. H. Schwarz
title: Decoupling Supergravity from the Superstring
significance: Argued N=8 supergravity cannot be decoupled from string theory for d>3, so even if UV-finite it is not a standalone quantum gravity.

authors: A. H. Chamseddine, A. Connes, M. Marcolli
title: Gravity and the standard model with neutrino mixing
significance: Full Standard Model with neutrino mixing coupled to gravity from NCG.

title: Group field theory as the microscopic description of the quantum spacetime fluid

title: Localization of gauge theory on a four-sphere and supersymmetric Wilson loops
significance: Founded supersymmetric localization, enabling exact finite-coupling AdS/CFT tests.

title: Partial and Complete Observables for Hamiltonian Constrained Systems
significance: Robust construction of relational Dirac observables for full general relativity.

authors: F. Denef, M. R. Douglas, S. Kachru
title: Physics of String Flux Compactifications
significance: Statistical foundations of the landscape (flux vacua counting, ~10^500).

authors: J. J. Halliwell, J. M. Yearsley
title: Spacetime Coarse Grainings in the Decoherent Histories Approach to Quantum Theory
significance: Applies decoherent histories to the arrival-time problem and the problem of time in reparametrization-invariant theories such as canonical quantum gravity.

authors: Z. Bern, J. J. M. Carrasco, L. J. Dixon, H. Johansson, D. A. Kosower, R. Roiban
title: Three-loop superfiniteness of N=8 supergravity
